visual_attributes.morphology: Arboreal gliding mammal with a patagium extending from neck to limbs and tail
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: Head-body length 33 to 42 cm, tail length 18 to 27 cm, weight 0.9 to 1.3 kg
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Kite-shaped skin membrane connecting neck, limbs, and tail

domain_specific_functional.DIETARY_HABITS: Feeds on leaves, buds, shoots, flowers, fruits, and sap
domain_specific_functional.REPRODUCTIVE_BEHAVIOR: Single offspring carried on mother's abdomen

relationships.description: Native to regions including southern Myanmar, Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, Singapore, and Indonesia

relationships.target: G. v. variegatus, G. v. temminckii, G. v. borneanus, G. v. peninsulae
relationships.description: Four subspecies based on geographic isolation and genetic divergence

contextual_attributes.geographic_range: Sunda Shelf mainland, northern Laos, Cambodia, Vietnam, Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore, Brunei, Indonesia
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Part of the forest ecosystem, hunted for food and fur
